special_mechanics.name: Cane Jump
special_mechanics.description: Primary jumping mechanic using Scrooge's cane. Noted as easier to perform in DuckTales 2 compared to the first game.

special_mechanics.name: Cane Interaction
special_mechanics.description: Scrooge can use his cane to interact with environmental objects including pulling levers, firing cannons, and using springy flowers to cross large gaps.

special_mechanics.name: Hook Hanging
special_mechanics.description: New mechanic allowing Scrooge to hang from hooks for traversal.

special_mechanics.name: Raft Movement
special_mechanics.description: Rafts that transport Scrooge across water.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Sources describe gameplay mechanics and controls qualitatively but do not provide quantified physics parameters. Nintendo Power praised 'great play control' suggesting responsive controls, but no specific movement values are documented.
sources_used: Nintendo Power review quoted in Wikipedia sources
